title.en: Electroacoustics - Hearing aids - Part 0: Measurement of the performance characteristics of hearing aids

standards.abstract: Specifies methods for measuring the electroacoustical characteristics of hearing aids for the purpose of quality assurance in production.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for freedom from holes in medical gloves for single use.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for physical properties (dimensions, tensile strength, freedom from pinholes) of medical gloves for single use.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for the biological evaluation of medical gloves for single use, including accelerated ageing and biocompatibility.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for power-assisted stretchers used for patient handling in road ambulances.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for powered patient chairs used for patient handling in road ambulances.

standards.abstract: Specifies validation methods and guidance for reprocessing instructions provided by medical device manufacturers for re-usable devices.

standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for isolator systems used for aseptic processing of health care products.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a liquid chemical sterilization process for single-use medical devices.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for low temperature steam and formaldehyde (LTSF) sterilizers.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of moist heat sterilization processes for medical devices.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for the development, validation and routine control of a low temperature steam and formaldehyde (LTSF) sterilization process.

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and tests for large steam sterilizers used primarily in healthcare facilities.
